content:
Become a CEL Partner – Earn $200 by spreading the word!‍

‍‍Inspire others to learn English abroad while earning commissions for every successful referral you make.

Join the CEL Affiliate Program and turn your passion for language learning into income. Whether you're a former student, a content creator, or simply someone who believes in the power of international education – our program gives you the tools to spread the word and get rewarded. Share your unique link, earn commissions, and help others discover high-quality English courses in California and Vancouver.

  • 10% on tuition fees
  • 200$ pro Durchschnittsbuchung durschnittlioche Provision liegt bei $200

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

1. Commission & Payment

Q1: What is the commission structure of the program?
A: Our program offers a 10% commission on tuition fees for every successful enrollment. Commission is paid only after a student makes a deposit and begins their program.

Q2: Do I earn commission on additional services, such as accommodation?
A: No. Commission applies solely to tuition fees. Services like accommodation are not eligible for commission.

Q3: What happens if a student cancels their enrollment?
A: If a student cancels before the program begins, no commission will be paid. We ensure that commissions are only paid when enrollments are confirmed and the student has started the program.

Q4: How and when will I receive my payments?
A: Payments are processed quarterly through the Awin platform. After the verification period (which confirms that the student has started the program), commissions will be included in your monthly payout.

Q5: How long is the tracking cookie valid?
A: We use a 30-day cookie. Any qualifying booking made within 30 days of a click from your affiliate link will be credited to you.

2. Registration & Account Setup

Q7: How do I register for the affiliate program?
A: You can register through the Awin platform. Complete your profile with your audience and marketing channel details. Once approved, you’ll receive a unique tracking ID and access to our creative asset hub.

Q8: What if I need help during registration?
A: Our dedicated Affiliate Manager is here to assist you. Please reach out via the provided contact details if you encounter any issues during registration.

3. Tracking & Performance

Q9: How will I track my performance and commissions?
A: Awin’s platform offers a robust dashboard that displays real-time metrics, including clicks, bookings, sold weeks, and tuition turnover. This transparency helps you monitor your performance effectively.

4. Creative Assets & Promotional Tools

Q11: What creative assets are available to me?
A: Our digital asset hub provides a variety of materials:

  • Landing Pages: One core page plus two location-specific pages (California and Vancouver).
  • Banners & Display Ads: Multiple sizes for both desktop (e.g., 728×90, 300×250, 160×600) and mobile (e.g., 320×50, 320×100) formats, available in both static and animated versions.
  • Email Templates: Customizable HTML email templates for launch, follow-up, and testimonial communications.
  • Social Media Graphics: Adaptable images designed for Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, and LinkedIn.
  • Video Assets: Short promo/explainer videos in MP4 format, with adaptations available for vertical formats suitable for platforms like TikTok and Instagram Reels.
  • Editable Templates & Guidelines: Files (e.g., Canva or PSD) with clear instructions to help you customize content while maintaining brand consistency.

Q12: Can I customize these assets for my local market?
A: Absolutely. We provide editable templates along with a detailed guideline on how to adjust messaging and imagery. This allows you to tailor the content for different regions while staying on brand.

5. Marketing & Best Practices

Q13: What marketing channels can I use to promote the program?
A: You can promote through various channels, including your website, blog, social media platforms, email newsletters, and video content. We encourage a multi-channel approach to maximize reach.

Q14: Are there any best practices for promoting the program?
A: Yes. We recommend:

  • Highlighting the unique selling points: great locations, small classes, and life-changing experiences.
  • Using our pre-designed landing pages and banners for consistency.
  • Customizing messaging to resonate with your audience while adhering to our brand guidelines.
  • Regularly reviewing performance metrics via Awin and adjusting your strategy accordingly.

6. Support & Community

Q16: What support is available if I have questions or need assistance?
A: We provide comprehensive support:

  • A dedicated Affiliate Manager to address your queries.
  • An onboarding manual and detailed FAQ document.
  • Regular updates via newsletters to keep you informed about any program changes, promotions, or new creative assets.

Q17: Who should I contact for technical issues or other inquiries?
A: Please contact our Affiliate Manager at [insert contact information]. We aim to respond within 48 hours to any queries or issues.
